title: The Wither Chronicles - Modpack
description: The Wither Chronicles is a modded gameplay series on YouTube. You must survive the Witherstorm before it eats up the entire world.
body:
# The Wither Chronicles - Modpack

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/za_0332wZcs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### The Wither Chronicles modpack has many modded features to make your experience with the witherstorm more immersive!

This has the following:
- A witherstorm (obviously)
- Fabric/Forge/Neoforge mod crossover
- Ambient sound effects
- Smoother FPS
- Proximity chat
- Replay mod for those YouTubers...
- Shaders
- Carry On
- Better Third Person
- Faster Minecarts
- Dual Horse Riding

 ...and much more!

 This is for a YouTube web-series titled "The Wither Chronicles". You can watch it now on the EmDoesStuff channel.
